candidates.row_label: Wages and social security contributions on goods sold
candidates.why: Clearly production/goods sold related, so excluded as COGS-like.
Too generic and appears unpopulated; less clear than explicit overhead buckets.
Explicit operating overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A component.
Component within selling/marketing, but category total exists.
Non-operative and therefore not preferred for SG&A.

Explicit operating overhead bucket; appropriate SG&A component.
Subcomponent within administration; category total exists.
Additional overhead bucket above operating profit; appropriate to include.
Broad personnel total that may overlap selling/admin/R&D; not preferred when explicit functional buckets exist.
Too vague and unpopulated.

Balance sheet liability, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No single company-wide SG&A line exists, so selected the main overhead buckets above operating profit. Included 'Research and Development' in XSGA as well because it is separately reported above EBIT and should be removed via XSGA - XRD. Excluded subcomponents and D&A lines to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Impairment losses - Selling, marketing and R&D
candidates.why: Impairment, not core R&D expense.
Dedicated above-EBIT R&D expense line; best match.
Supplemental disclosure and below main statement; secondary fallback only.

variables.notes: Selected the dedicated primary R&D expense line reported above operating profit.

Not a standard interest expense line; appears derived/mixed.
